title: ocotea psychotrioides
intro: Ocotea psychotrioides, also known as Cananga or Ylang-Ylang, is a flowering plant native to Indonesia and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its essential oils, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including their antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ocotea psychotrioides include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting skin health, among others. Ocotea psychotrioides is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, perfumes, and aromatherapy products, and can also be found in some herbal teas and supplements.
